zh.title: Connective | 林微
zh.metaDescription: 林微的 Connective 主页帮助访问者复制 Prompt，并写出更清楚的第一句话。

hero.title: 把陌生开场变成真实连接
hero.lede: 选择一个联系目的，复制一段林微的上下文 Prompt，让你的 AI 助手帮你写出第一句话。

contextCards.title: 林微关心什么
contextCards.body: 城市研究、公共空间、社区协作，以及技术如何帮助人把真实意图说清楚。

contextCards.title: 你可以找她聊什么
contextCards.body: 城市里的真实连接、一篇文章里的判断，或一个还没有完全成形的公共项目。

contextCards.title: 一些公开痕迹
contextCards.body: 林微写关于城市研究、社区协作和长期关系的文章，也关注 AI 如何帮助人更准确地表达。

dialog.title: 把 Prompt 交给你的 AI 助手
dialog.description: 点一个平台，会先复制 Prompt，再打开对应助手。也可以只复制。

contact.body: 先复制 Prompt，让你的 AI 助手帮你整理第一句话。然后通过你已有的渠道联系林微。

ui.copiedManualOpen: Prompt 已复制。请再次点击 {{modelName}} 打开。
ui.copyBlockedOpen: 浏览器不允许自动复制，Prompt 已选中。请按 Command+C / Ctrl+C 复制，再打开 {{modelName}}。
ui.copiedPrompt: Prompt 已复制。现在可以粘贴到你选择的大模型里。
ui.copyBlockedOnly: 浏览器不允许自动复制，Prompt 已选中。请按 Command+C / Ctrl+C 复制。

prompt.assistantRole: 你是我的私人沟通助手。
prompt.contextIntro: 我准备联系{{personName}}。下面是{{personName}}本人提供的个人上下文。
prompt.generationIntro: 请基于这个目的和下面的个人上下文，帮我生成：
tasks: 一段自然、不油腻的第一句话
一句我可以用来介绍自己的话
一个明确但不冒犯的联系意图
三个语气版本：轻松、真诚、直接
requirements: 不要假装我已经和{{personName}}很熟
不要过度夸张或过度热情
如果我的目的还不清楚，先向我追问 2-3 个问题
输出要适合发在微信、邮件或私信里

zh.profileContext:
# 林微 / Lin Wei

## 一句话定位
林微，一个长期写城市研究、公共空间和真实连接的人。

## 她关心什么
- 城市研究如何落到人的具体生活里。
- 公共空间如何帮助陌生人建立真实连接。
- AI 如何帮助人把合作意图表达得更清楚。
- 长期关系、社区协作和可以沉淀的对话。

## 联系方式
- Email：lin@example.com
- GitHub：lin-wei-lab
- Writing：城市研究和公共空间笔记。

meet.label: 认识我
meet.shortDescription: 写一段自然的破冰开场。
meet.addition: 这个场景偏向自然破冰。请让开场白像一个真实的人想认识另一个真实的人，而不是社交模板。

thought.label: 聊一篇文章 / 一个观点
thought.shortDescription: 围绕写作和思考发起对话。
thought.purposeText: 聊一篇文章 / 一个观点
thought.addition: 这个场景偏向围绕一篇文章、一个观点或一次表达继续交流。请先提醒我补充：我读到的内容是什么、哪个观点触发了我、我想继续讨论什么。

create.label: 一起做点事
create.addition: 这个场景偏向合作、访谈、项目或机会。请先帮助我说清楚：我想做什么、我能提供什么、我希望林微怎么回应。

en.title: Connective | Lin Wei
en.metaDescription: Lin Wei's Connective page helps visitors copy a context prompt and write a clearer first message.

hero.title: Turn a cold opening into a real connection
hero.lede: Choose why you want to reach out, copy Lin Wei's context prompt, and let your AI assistant shape the opening line.

contextCards.title: What Lin cares about
contextCards.body: Urban systems, public space, community collaboration, and tools that help people state intent more clearly.

contextCards.title: What to ask her about
contextCards.body: Real connection in cities, a judgment from an essay, or an unfinished public project idea.

contextCards.title: Public traces
contextCards.body: Lin writes about urban systems, community work, long-term relationships, and how AI can support clearer expression.

workbench.title: How do you want to begin?

dialog.title: Give the prompt to your AI assistant
dialog.description: Pick a platform to copy the prompt first, then open the assistant. You can also copy only.

contact.body: Copy the prompt first, let your AI assistant organize the first message, then contact Lin through a channel you already have.

ui.copiedManualOpen: Prompt copied. Click {{modelName}} again to open it.
ui.copyBlockedOpen: The browser blocked automatic copy. The prompt is selected. Press Command+C / Ctrl+C, then open {{modelName}}.
ui.copiedPrompt: Prompt copied. You can now paste it into the model you choose.
ui.copyBlockedOnly: The browser blocked automatic copy. The prompt is selected. Press Command+C / Ctrl+C.

prompt.assistantRole: You are my private communication assistant.
prompt.contextIntro: I am preparing to contact {{personName}}. Below is the personal context provided by {{personName}}.
prompt.generationIntro: Based on this intent and the personal context below, help me generate:
tasks: A natural first line that does not feel greasy or overdone
One sentence I can use to introduce myself
A clear but non-intrusive contact intent
Three tone options: casual, sincere, direct
requirements: Do not pretend I already know {{personName}} well
Do not exaggerate or sound overly enthusiastic
Do not invent experiences for me
If my intent is still unclear, ask me 2-3 follow-up questions first
The output should work for WeChat, email, or direct messages

en.profileContext:
# Lin Wei / 林微

## One-line positioning
Lin Wei writes about urban systems, public space, and real connection.

## What she cares about
- How urban systems land in actual everyday life.
- How public spaces help strangers build real connection.
- How AI can help people express collaboration intent more clearly.
- Long-term relationships, community work, and conversations that accumulate.

## Contact
- Email: lin@example.com
- GitHub: lin-wei-lab
- Writing: notes on urban systems and public space.

meet.label: Get to know me
meet.addition: This scenario is about a natural icebreaker. Make the opening feel like one real person trying to meet another real person, not a social template.

thought.label: Discuss an essay / idea
thought.shortDescription: Start a conversation around writing and thinking.
thought.addition: This scenario is about continuing a conversation around an essay, an idea, or a piece of expression. First remind me to clarify: what I read, which point triggered me, and what I want to discuss next.

create.label: Collaborate on something
create.addition: This scenario is about collaboration, an interview, a project, or an opportunity. First help me clarify: what I want to do, what I can offer, and how I hope Lin responds.
